svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 245, 245), rgb(26, 26, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 176px; height: 1px; padding-top: 153px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/eval-setup
Install dependencies
Configure MLflow tracking
Verify API keys
Preflight environment check

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 232, 232), rgb(38, 38, 38)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 180px; height: 1px; padding-top: 149px; margin-left: 235px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/eval-analyze
Deep-read target SKILL.md
Follow sub-skill chains
Generate eval.yaml config
Define judges and schemas

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 232, 232), rgb(38, 38, 38)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 150px; margin-left: 462px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/eval-dataset
Bootstrap or expand cases
Generate inputs from schema
Create annotations/answers
Coverage gap analysis

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 245, 245), rgb(26, 26, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 193px; height: 1px; padding-top: 138px; margin-left: 687px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/eval-run
Execute skill per case
Collect artifacts + outputs
Score with inline + LLM judges
Detect regressions vs baseline
Generate HTML report

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 232, 232), rgb(38, 38, 38)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 176px; height: 1px; padding-top: 59px; margin-left: 937px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/eval-review
Present scores per case
Collect human feedback
Identify judge gaps
Propose SKILL.md edits

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 232, 232), rgb(38, 38, 38)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 180px; height: 1px; padding-top: 259px; margin-left: 937px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/eval-optimize
Identify judge failures
Analyze transcripts
Edit SKILL.md automatically
Re-run with regression check

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 245, 245), rgb(26, 26, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 153px; height: 1px; padding-top: 449px; margin-left: 937px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/eval-mlflow
Sync datasets to MLflow
Log run results + metrics
Push/pull feedback
